misc: Rarely uses his driver, which has raised questions about his masculinity.
biography: Ossi, representing Kullo Golf Club, is set to make his fourth appearance in the esteemed Hector Trophée at the upcoming 2026 edition. His consistent presence over previous years has established him as a dedicated participant in this renowned pair competition, always bringing a focused approach to the greens.

Across his three prior participations, Ossi has consistently applied himself with unwavering effort. Despite his determined play, the ultimate accolades have remained just beyond his grasp; neither the coveted Hector Trophée for his pairing nor the prestigious individual Victor Trophy has, to date, been secured, underscoring the formidable competitive landscape of the event.

A distinguishing characteristic of Ossi's game is his infrequent reliance on the driver, a tactical choice that often sparks discussion among observers. This calculated decision, while unconventional for some, highlights a deliberate mastery of course management, prioritizing precision and control over sheer distance. Such an approach, while potentially defying traditional notions of power in golf, speaks to a confident and self-assured player who shapes his game to his own unique strengths.
